## Variable: default

# Variable: default

> `const` **default**: `A16nPlugin`

Defined in: [index.ts:9](https://github.com/Texarkanine/a16n/blob/da80b7ce7e1c2f673a173df8051c4e7a36d9fe05/packages/plugin-cursor/src/index.ts#L9)

Cursor IDE plugin for a16n.
Supports discovery and emission of Cursor rules.
